description_long: This is an ornate, vintage rotary dial telephone with a black and gold color scheme, featuring intricate floral engravings on its metallic legs and base. The phone has a prominent rotary dial with gold numbers and a central emblem, and a classic cradle supporting a cylindrical handset. The handset is connected to the base by a thick, red coiled cord, and the earpiece and mouthpiece are both finished in black and gold. The base is robust and elevated on four decorative legs, giving it a stately, antique appearance. The side of the phone features a mechanical winding handle, adding to its historical charm. This object is reminiscent of early 20th-century telephones, often found in upscale homes or offices.
description: A vintage black and gold rotary dial telephone with ornate engravings, a red coiled cord, and a classic handset cradle. The design is elegant and antique, with a robust, decorative base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rotary dial, ornate legs, and the handset resting on the cradle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the mechanical winding handle and the profile of the handset.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the coiled cord attachment and the back of the cradle and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the coiled cord prominently visible and the side of the rotary dial.
